utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 corresponding sections. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property with details (type, location, details, possession date, taxes) and price — fully specified. 2) financing: provides a financing solution (cash purchase using equity), contact, consultation date, available equity, and notes terms pending — sufficiently specified as a plan with terms context. 3) legal_services: provider, firm, services, cost, contact, appointment — fully specified with costs. 4) moving_services: provider, specialist, service description, cost, contact, consultation — fully specified with costs. 5) setup_services: provider, coordinator, detailed services with costs, total cost, contact, consultation, completion date — fully specified. 6) total_budget: itemized costs, total initial investment, taxes, within budget statement, financing source — fully specified. All 6 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item in the final solution and match it to the closest named option in the ground-truth ratings. The property is a purchase and matches 'Family House' on price and description. Financing 'Cash purchase' maps to 'Cash Purchase' in purchase_financing. Legal services 'Premium Legal Package' maps directly. Moving services 'Premium Moving Service' maps to 'Premium Moving'. Utility setup at CAD $280 maps to 'Premium Utilities'.
